title: #amytangerine | Calendar Stamp
excerpt: Here's our second installment of this new weekly feature where we highlight some photos of our products using the hashtag #amytangerine. You can see the first one here with the embroidery stencils . If you want to see a video…
body:
Here's our second installment of this new weekly feature where we highlight some photos of our products using the hashtag #amytangerine. You can see the first one here with the embroidery stencils. If you want to see a video of these in action, May Flaum used the kits in this video. Spotted on Instagram, one of my favorite products - our Calendar stamp! Jennifer McGuire did a fantastic demonstration video. It's available online at Two Peas in a Bucket and Simon Says Stamp.

from top to bottom, left to right

1. @nikatous | 2. @samssissy | 3. @corbearlove | 4. @kismet1990 | 5. @atypicalcupcake | 6. @cathy_vee | 7. @megan_nerdnest | 8. @reddirtsissy | 9. @happiescrappie
